pageContext.name: Eternal Sailor Moon and Eternal Sailor Chibi Moon
pageContext.description: Bandai Spirits Ichibansho is proud to announce their newest release Eternal Sailor Moon & Eternal Sailor Chibi Moon (Eternal Sailor Guardians)! This statue is expertly crafted and meticulously sculpted to look like Eternal Sailor Moon & Eternal Sailor Chibi Moon from their respective anime. Standing at approximately 5.5' tall, Eternal Sailor Moon & Eternal Sailor Chibi Moon is seen in their popular pose. Be sure to collect this and enhance your display with other incredible Ichibansho figures!
